name: What's the difference between workers comp and occupational disease claim for noise loss?

mainEntity.name: What's the difference between workers comp and occupational disease claim for noise loss?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Occupational disease claims cover gradual losses like noise; standard comp for acute incidents.** Utah has specific hearing loss statute under both.[6][2] Same benefits, different proof burdens. Disease needs cumulative exposure link.[1] File under whichever fits.
